title: Masayukis Music Videos
wikitext:
[]: Masayuki's Music Videos             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 20, 2007 9:32 pm Awkwardly split from "Death & Rebirth... and my mother." So allow me to add a formal introduction that repeats some of the stuff in the newfangled thread. Masayuki is the assistant director of the TV series and the director of DEATH. He's also more recently edited together some interesting music videos set to NGE vocal numbers. The first two were the so-called Full-Length Opening and Full-Length Ending, released on the 01 Test Type DVD to promote the upcoming remastered version of the series (Renewal for short). (You can find these in the Omake section of Monkey's site.) There has been discussion on these in the past, which you can surely find at ANF and here if you set your mind to it. A few more were released on the NGE MUSIC & REMIX DVD . There is are RARs -- albeit incomplete ones -- floating around for this, of course, but you're left to your own devices to find them. They reveal that the DVD is really not worth buying, at least at full price, but some of the music videos are rather interesting nonetheless. I've taken the liberty of providing the three devoted to the main "Eva Girls" for your perusal and subsequent discussion. Asuka: Tamashii no Refrain (Soul Refrain) Rei: Tengoku no Kioku (Memories of Paradise) Misato: THANATOS --IF I CAN'T BE YOURS-- Onward and upwards. --Reichu Sailor StarDust wrote: I like the weirdness factor [of Rebirth] as well as the Tamashii No Rufuran ED, but oh well. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Mar 21, 2007 12:27 am It always annoyed the hell out of me that manga never subbed that song, do you have a translation to the lyrics?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 21, 2007 9:12 am Defectron wrote: It always annoyed the hell out of me that manga never subbed that song, do you have a translation to the lyrics?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Mar 21, 2007 12:49 pm What's up with the "Reichu, translate everything for me!" trend around here, anyway?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 21, 2007 1:38 pm Because her nihongo is l33t?? But I agree that Google, speicifcally http://www.animelyrics.tv/anime/eva/ is your friend.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 21, 2007 6:02 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Because her nihongo is l33t??

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 21, 2007 6:42 pm SSD has not had time to watch it yet. But she will find the time either tomorrow or Friday. And she will also be sure to comment on the tengoku no kioku video as well as stop referring to herself in third person. :P

[]: Stardust's long-awaited (ha, yeah right) AMV reply:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 4:06 pm I like the fact it begins ala Rebirth ED. Very nice! Though what's with the little text on the bottom of the video with kanjiEVAkanji? Starting out with Asuka's False Rebirth: WIN. *5 second delayed response (sadly this part isnâ€™t a joke! -_-)* HOLY CRAP IT'S ASUKA-CENTERIC! WAI~~~ Perhaps to go along with the fact that TnK is Rei-centeric? Very nice! In terms of AMVs, it's sad how only actual anime compaines know how to make a good AMV, and fan ones tend to be lacking. Granted, I know that's not ALWAYS the case, just something I personally noticed. Sidenote: Espeically watching this musicvideo, it should be clear to anyone that something is not right with Asuka in the final battle, if not realizing the fact she's regressed/Kyoko's behind the regins of nigoki. The very end: Yay! Pleased to know it more or less ended as I thought it would. A shot from I Need You. * squee! * (And of course, that cut of Maggoty Asuka-chan TM had to be thrown in for good measure! ^^; ) Out of curiosityâ€™s sake, are you going to make these 2 vids available for download off of your FGC site for the general Evageeks public? Thanks so much for the upload!

[]: Re: Stardust's long-awaited (ha, yeah right) AMV reply:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 22, 2007 7:12 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I like the fact it begins ala Rebirth ED. Very nice!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 22, 2007 9:09 pm I always assoicated Thanatos with Rei and I guess to an extent (although this isn't the case afterall ^^; ) Komm, Susser Tod with Asuka. I guess her "song" WOULD be Tamashii~ then? Are there any Shinji-centeric ones? I'm telling you, the poor boy needs some love! ;) The final sequence WAS interesting... (immature response: lolz I C Shinji's cum! ZOMG ...unless that was a few minutes before ) Reichu wrote: Check out the people at the animelyrics.tv forum, and then I dare you to say that again.
